content.text:
Perfect! The dev server is running. Now let me create a comprehensive summary of what was built:

## Summary

I've successfully built all the core UI components for the Rearden video-first hiring platform web app. Here's what was created:

### Components Built (12 total)

**1. Button** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\Button\`
- Three variants: primary (purple gradient), secondary (glass with purple border), ghost (transparent)
- Three sizes: sm (32px), md (40px), lg (48px)
- Motion animations with scale on hover/tap
- Supports both button and anchor (href) rendering

**2. Input** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\Input\`
- Dark glass background with focus animations
- Optional icon support (positioned inside left)
- Error state with red border and error message
- Purple border glow animation on focus

**3. SkillTag** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\SkillTag\`
- Pill-shaped badge for displaying skills
- Two variants: default (glass) and match (purple gradient)
- Two sizes: sm and md

**4. ScoreBadge** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\ScoreBadge\`
- Displays match percentage
- Color-coded: teal (≥80%), purple (≥60%), muted (<60%)
- Subtle glow effect for high scores

**5. Logo** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\Logo\`
- Text wordmark "rearden" with purple-to-teal gradient
- Three sizes: sm (18px), md (24px), lg (32px)

**6. PageTransition** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\PageTransition\`
- Motion wrapper for page transitions
- Fade in/out with vertical slide animation

**7. Navbar** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\Navbar\`
- Fixed top navigation with glass background
- Logo on left, nav links on right
- Animated purple indicator under active link using layoutId

**8. Layout** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\Layout\`
- Main layout wrapper with Navbar
- AnimatePresence for page transitions
- Uses react-router-dom Outlet

**9. SearchBar** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\SearchBar\`
- Large search input with glass background
- Animated glowing border
- Rotating placeholder text (4 different messages, 3-second crossfade)
- Loading state with spinning icon
- Submits on Enter key

**10. CandidateCard** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\CandidateCard\`
- Glass card with 16:9 thumbnail at top
- ScoreBadge overlay in top-right corner
- Displays name, title, location
- Up to 4 skill tags
- Optional match reason text
- Hover animation: lift up 4px, thumbnail scales to 1.05

**11. VideoPlayer** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\VideoPlayer\`
- HTML5 video with custom play/pause overlay
- Large centered glass button with play icon
- Shows browser controls when playing
- Rounded corners

**12. VideoUpload** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\components\VideoUpload\`
- Drag-and-drop zone with dashed border
- File input for click-to-upload
- Upload progress bar with percentage
- Video preview after upload
- Re-upload button

### Hooks & Utilities

**API Layer** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\lib\api.ts`
- `apiFetch<T>()` - Generic fetch wrapper for API calls

**useApi Hook** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\hooks\useApi.ts`
- Generic hook for GET requests
- Returns data, loading, error, refetch

**useSearch Hook** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\hooks\useSearch.ts`
- Debounced search (400ms)
- POST /api/search when query present
- GET /api/candidates when empty (featured candidates)
- Returns query, setQuery, results, loading, error

**useVideoUpload Hook** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\hooks\useVideoUpload.ts`
- XMLHttpRequest-based upload with progress tracking
- Creates local object URL for preview
- Returns upload function, uploading state, progress, previewUrl

### Router Setup

**Router** - `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\router.tsx`
- Four routes configured:
  - `/` - Landing
  - `/search` - Search
  - `/candidate/:id` - CandidateProfile
  - `/register` - Register

**Pages** - Placeholder pages created:
- `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Landing\Landing.tsx`
- `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Search\Search.tsx`
- `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\CandidateProfile\CandidateProfile.tsx`
- `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Register\Register.tsx`

### Key Implementation Details

1. All components use SCSS Modules with camelCase-only class names
2. Motion v12 imports from `"motion/react"`
3. Path alias `@/` configured in Vite for src imports
4. TypeScript types imported from `@rearden/types`
5. All SCSS files use relative paths for variables/mixins: `@use "../../styles/variables" as *;`
6. Old App.tsx and App.module.scss removed
7. main.tsx updated to use RouterProvider

### Status

- All TypeScript compilation passes
- Dev server starts successfully on port 3000
- API proxy configured to port 3001
- Ready for page implementation

The component library provides a complete foundation for building the Rearden video-first hiring platform UI with consistent styling, animations, and accessibility features.
